reviews.comment:
Baje a tomar algo y comprar galletas. Compré medias lunas.... Únicas, riquísimas.

(Translated by Google)
I went down to get something to eat and buy some cookies. I bought croissants... Unique, delicious.

reviews.comment:
Baños siempre limpio. Lugar de descanso arbolado y siempre en condiciones. Mí parada preferida yendo a la costa si llevo a mí perra

(Translated by Google)
The restrooms are always clean. The shaded rest area is always well-maintained. My favorite stop on the way to the coast when I have my dog ​​with me.

reviews.comment:
Es mejor el servicio de las full que del ACA. No me gusto

(Translated by Google)
The service at the full-service stations is better than at the ACA. I didn't like it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYNnBXVHpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
No aceptan la  app de ypf , solo efectivo , o debito ,  precios muy caros  poco personal para la atencion los fines de semana largos ,  no voy nunca mas .

(Translated by Google)
They don't accept the YPF app, only cash or debit, very expensive prices, few staff to serve you on long weekends, I'll never go back.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNYOU1ySVV3EAE
